differential_diagnoses: Primary cardiac diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
Primary mediastinal B-cell lymphoma with cardiac extension
next_steps: 18F-FDG PET-CT for systemic staging and metabolic assessment
Endobronchial ultrasound-guided biopsy of mediastinal lymph nodes for definitive histopathology
Cardiac MRI with gadolinium contrast to assess tissue characterization and extent of myocardial infiltration
Pericardiocentesis with cytology and flow cytometry of pericardial fluid
Serum immunofixation and free light chain assay to screen for lymphoproliferative disorders
Formal oncology consultation to guide management of rapidly progressive cardiac mass
